title: geum quellyon
intro: Geum quellyon, also known as New Zealand avens, is a perennial flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to help soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Geum quellyon include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce blood sugar levels, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Geum quellyon often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
